mapper.select: select to_char(SYSDATE-7, 'mm/dd') as md_7 ,to_char(SYSDATE-6, 'mm/dd') as md_6 ,to_char(SYSDATE-5, 'mm/dd') as md_5 ,to_char(SYSDATE-4, 'mm/dd') as md_4 ,to_char(SYSDATE-3, 'mm/dd') as md_3 ,to_char(SYSDATE-2, 'mm/dd') as md_2 ,to_char(SYSDATE-1, 'mm/dd') as md_1 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-7) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_7 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-6) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_6 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-5) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_5 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-4) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_4 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-3) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_3 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-2) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_2 ,sum(case when basedate = trunc(SYSDATE-1) then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 from ( select trunc(basedate) basedate, count(1) cnt from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a where basedate >= SYSDATE - 7 and RESTORE_DATE is null group by basedate ) f

select to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -11),'yy/mm') ym_11 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -10),'yy/mm') ym_10 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -9),'yy/mm') ym_9 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -8),'yy/mm') ym_8 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -7),'yy/mm') ym_7 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -6),'yy/mm') ym_6 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -5),'yy/mm') ym_5 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -4),'yy/mm') ym_4 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3),'yy/mm') ym_3 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -2),'yy/mm') ym_2 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yy/mm') ym_1 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yy/mm') ym_1 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -0),'yy/mm') ym_0 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -11),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_11 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -10),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_10 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -9),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_9 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -8),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_8 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -7),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_7 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -6),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_6 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -5),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_5 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -4),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_4 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_3 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -2),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_2 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 ,sum(case when basedate = to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -0),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_0 from ( select to_char(basedate,'yymm') basedate, count(1) cnt from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a where basedate >= add_months(SYSDATE, -12) and RESTORE_DATE is null group by to_char(basedate,'yymm') ) f

select to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -11),'yy/mm') ym_11 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -10),'yy/mm') ym_10 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -9),'yy/mm') ym_9 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -8),'yy/mm') ym_8 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -7),'yy/mm') ym_7 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -6),'yy/mm') ym_6 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -5),'yy/mm') ym_5 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -4),'yy/mm') ym_4 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3),'yy/mm') ym_3 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -2),'yy/mm') ym_2 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yy/mm') ym_1 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yy/mm') ym_1 ,to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -0),'yy/mm') ym_0 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -11),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_11 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -10),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_10 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -9),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_9 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -8),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_8 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -7),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_7 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -6),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_6 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -5),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_5 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -4),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_4 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -3),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_3 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -2),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_2 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -1),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_1 ,sum(case when basedate <= to_char(add_months(SYSDATE, -0),'yymm') then cnt else 0 end ) as cnt_0 from ( select to_char(basedate,'yymm') basedate, count(1) cnt from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a where basedate >= add_months(SYSDATE, -12) and RESTORE_DATE is null group by to_char(basedate,'yymm') ) f
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a where 1=1

select system, policy_id, jobid, delete_cnt, archive_cnt, restore_cnt, arc_del_cnt from ( select ROWNUM rn, system, policy_id, jobid, delete_cnt, archive_cnt, restore_cnt, arc_del_cnt from ( select b.system, b.policy_id, a.jobid , count(delete_date) as delete_cnt , count(archive_date) as archive_cnt , count(restore_date) as restore_cnt , sum(case when a.arc_del_date < SYSDATE then 1 else 0 end) as arc_del_cnt from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a, cotdl.tbl_piiorder b where a.orderid = b.orderid
group by b.system, b.policy_id, a.jobid order by b.system, b.policy_id, a.jobid ) a where
ROWNUM <= #{pagenum} * #{amount} order by system, policy_id, jobid ) f where rn > (#{pagenum} -1) * #{amount} order by system, policy_id, jobid

select count(1) from ( select b.system, b.policy_id, a.jobid from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a, cotdl.tbl_piiorder b where a.orderid = b.orderid
group by b.system, b.policy_id, a.jobid ) f
